entities.description: agent based retrieval is a proposed approach for dynamically classifying queries and configuring retrieval workflows
information foraging theory is the theoretical inspiration behind the proposed agent based retrieval approach
queries are the inputs that the agent based retrieval approach dynamically classifies
retrieval workflows are the processes configured by the approach to locate evidence
documents are the source material within which highly relevant evidence is located
evidence refers to the highly relevant information sought within the documents

relations.description: the agent based retrieval approach is explicitly inspired by information foraging theory
the agent based retrieval approach dynamically classifies queries
the agent based retrieval approach configures optimal retrieval workflows
the approach operates within documents to locate evidence
the goal of the approach is to locate highly relevant evidence within documents
information foraging theory serves as the inspiration for the agent based retrieval approach
